mapper.select:
SELECT sr.id, sr.role_name, sr.role_code, sr.role_level, sr.system_data, sr.data_status, sr.role_order, sr.create_time FROM sys_role sr WHERE sr.enabled = '1'
AND sr.role_name LIKE CONCAT(#{req.roleName},'%')
AND sr.role_code LIKE CONCAT(#{req.roleCode},'%')
AND sr.data_status = #{req.dataStatus}
AND sr.create_time BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{req.startTime}, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(#{req.endTime}, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
ORDER BY sr.role_order, sr.id

SELECT sr.id AS role_id, sm.permission_code FROM sys_role_menu srm INNER JOIN sys_role sr ON srm.role_id = sr.id AND sr.enabled = '1' INNER JOIN sys_menu sm ON srm.menu_id = sm.id AND sm.enabled = '1' WHERE srm.enabled = '1' AND sm.permission_code != ''

SELECT sr.id AS role_id, sm.id AS menu_id FROM sys_role_menu srm INNER JOIN sys_role sr ON srm.role_id = sr.id AND sr.enabled = '1' INNER JOIN sys_menu sm ON srm.menu_id = sm.id AND sm.enabled = '1' WHERE srm.enabled = '1'
